case_title: FERNANDEZ, ELEANOR vs. ZELAYA, MARIO et al

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF MAY-16-1994, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON MAY-16-1994, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JUN-15-1994 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
